XMLDB.COMMENT: Nucleus federation spoke — local mapping of federation-participating courses plus course-versioning instance / notification state (ADR-014).

TABLE.NAME: local_nucleusspoke_courses
TABLE.COMMENT: One row per local course that participates in the federation. Mode 'content' rows are local copies restored from a hub MBZ; mode 'identity' rows are placeholders whose enrolments get mirrored to the hub.

FIELD.NAME: hubcourseid
FIELD.COMMENT: Corresponding course id on the hub

FIELD.NAME: mode
FIELD.COMMENT: content | identity — matches the mode at the time the association was created

FIELD.NAME: timesynced
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix time of the last sync (backup restore for content, enablement for identity)

INDEX.NAME: localcourseid
INDEX.COMMENT: One federation row per local course.

INDEX.NAME: hubcourseid
INDEX.COMMENT: Reverse lookup by hub course id (one hub course can map to multiple local rows only across time, not concurrently).

TABLE.NAME: local_nucleusspoke_instance
TABLE.COMMENT: Spoke-side tracking for a local course that is pinned to a specific version of a hub-published course family. One row per pulled Moodle course. The same family can have multiple instances on a spoke (e.g. v1.0 running while v1.1 pulled as a new instance) — per ADR-014 spokes never replace in place.

FIELD.NAME: versionid
FIELD.COMMENT: FK to local_nucleuscommon_version.id. Immutable after creation — instance is pinned to this version for life.

FIELD.NAME: localcourseid
FIELD.COMMENT: mdl_course.id of the local Moodle course restored from the version's snapshot.

FIELD.NAME: state
FIELD.COMMENT: active | closed-to-enrolment | archived | staging. See ADR-014 §Spoke-side decision lifecycle for transitions.

FIELD.NAME: pulledbyid
FIELD.COMMENT: Local Moodle user id of the spoke admin who triggered the pull.

FIELD.NAME: pullnotes
FIELD.COMMENT: ADR-021 v1.1 — JSON list of Tier C notes captured at pull time: manifest_checker observations (e.g. older spoke plugin version) plus Moodle restore precheck warnings (e.g. backup-from-newer-Moodle compatibility note). Surfaced in the spoke's catalogue UI.

INDEX.NAME: localcourseid
INDEX.COMMENT: A given local course backs at most one instance.

INDEX.NAME: family_state
INDEX.COMMENT: 'Show me active instances of family X'.

TABLE.NAME: local_nucleusspoke_notification
TABLE.COMMENT: Spoke-local queue of 'a new version of a family you have pulled is available'. One row per (family, version) on this spoke. Received via the control-plane fan-out (ADR-014 §Notifications) and resolved by pulling, snoozing, or dismissing.

FIELD.NAME: state
FIELD.COMMENT: pending | snoozed | dismissed | resolved. 'resolved' means the spoke pulled the version (or a later one).

FIELD.NAME: snoozeuntil
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix time the notification auto-returns to 'pending'. Null unless state = snoozed.

FIELD.NAME: timeresolved
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix time state moved to resolved / dismissed (for history queries).

FIELD.NAME: resolvedbyid
FIELD.COMMENT: User id that resolved it, if any.

INDEX.NAME: family_version
INDEX.COMMENT: Idempotent fan-out: re-notifying the same version is a no-op.

INDEX.NAME: state_received
INDEX.COMMENT: 'List pending notifications in arrival order' for dashboard.
